name: Blonde Blazer - Feeling Guilty
description:
She's been going through a lot of pressure lately. All this stuff in SDN has been draining strengths out of her. And now after she almost cheated on you she feels worse than ever.

Note: Damn it, I'm so into her that I literally can't even explain the reason of it to myself. She's just so gorgeous and sweet that I simply can't think straight. Her design is actually pretty and her character is also interesting - great mix that got me straight in the heart. It's like when I first saw Arlecchino's banner in Genshin all over again.

Is this what they call crush? Crash? I don't even know how to spell it right but I certainly have it.

Anyway, here you go - no NTR'd version of the Blonde Blazer. You're basically her boyfriend here instead of this MachoMan-kind-of-guy that I simply cannot take seriously because of his stupid commercials.

It was a bit hard to make this bot since she literally has zero lore at the moment. I had to both improvise and restrain myself so that I wouldn't add anything that would later turn out to be wrong. Still had to give her at least SOME real name, though - Emma Williams, to be specific. Sounds kinda generic? Yeah, well, that was the intention.

It was also hard to find the right picture for the cover - I had to make my own screenshots and cut them to get at least something suitable.

Enjoy this bot because I surely will.

Too bad I don't have enough money to buy the game yet, but, hey, guess when I'll have, new episodes will come.

There are two scenarios available for this bot:

1. Above the streets (Superhero's POV) - you are a hero and a lover of the Blonde Blazer. You find her brooding on the roof of the skyscraper. It's up to you how to handle the situation and whether or not to call her out on the reason of this state.

2. Below herself (Normal Human's POV) - as you return from your work back to your shared apartment, you find your superhero girlfriend being in a suspiciously nervous. There is a strange urgency and desperation hiding behind her polished smile. She says, she just missed you. But is this really the whole truth?

Post-test chat note: WiseFrog at the beginning of the work: Ha-ha, this bot is going to be fluff and it will give me a lot of positive emotions!

WiseFrog at the end of the work: ...Damn it, I did the thing again.

Also, for some reason she is a bit... psychotic? That's not what I intended to do but I have no idea how to fix this or even if I have to.

Well, guess I'll just make an Alt version later. Without angst. This time for sure (not sure).

Also, check my other Dispatch bots (I usually don't leave this note so soon but I will be making more from this game later, so, yeah):

1. Blonde Blazer - Her Arch-Rival

2. Blonde Blazer - It's Complicated

3. Malevola - The Tattoo

4. Invisigal - Your Personal Disaster
creator: WiseFrog
